segments.caption: The video opens with a close-up of a woman with long reddish-brown hair, wearing a white robe with red trim, seated at a low wooden table in a dimly lit, ornately decorated room with dark blue walls featuring intricate silver patterns. She smiles and speaks animatedly as the camera pulls back to reveal three other participants seated around the table: a man in a white robe with gray patterns, a man in a gray robe, and a woman in a dark blue robe with red trim. The group engages in a lively discussion, laughing and gesturing, with the woman in the white robe clapping her hands in excitement. The scene then cuts to a wider shot of a grand, multi-tiered ancient Chinese courtyard with red lanterns and wooden balconies, where the same group stands in a line, facing a large, rotating octahedral die with Chinese characters on each face. The die lands on a side showing the character '肆' (four), and on-screen text appears: '周深: 壹肆肆肆' (Zhou Shen: 1444). The participants react with surprise and amusement, with the man in the gray robe looking particularly animated. The camera focuses on the man in the white robe, who smiles broadly, and then cuts to a close-up of the woman in the dark blue robe, who laughs and gestures excitedly. The scene ends with a wide shot of the courtyard, showing the group standing together, with the die in the foreground and the on-screen text '二人都是第三等 但周深数字更大' (Both are third class, but Zhou Shen's number is larger), indicating a competitive game element. The atmosphere is playful and theatrical, with traditional Chinese decor and dynamic interactions among the participants.

segments.caption: The video opens in a grand, two-story traditional Chinese-style hall adorned with red drapery, wooden pillars, and hanging yellow lanterns, creating a festive and historical ambiance. Several participants dressed in traditional robes—white, blue, and gray with red accents—gather in the central courtyard. A man in a white robe with black trim, identified by on-screen text as '周深' (Zhou Shen), performs an energetic gesture, raising his hands in excitement. The camera cuts to a woman in a gray robe with red trim and a black vest, identified as '章若楠' (Zhang Ruonan), who laughs and gestures animatedly. A large red ball rolls into the scene, and Zhang Ruonan begins a challenge, stepping on circular markers while calling out numbers: '壹贰参肆伍' (one, two, three, four, five), as indicated by on-screen text. The group watches with amusement, and a large rotating octahedral die with Chinese numerals is shown rolling on the ground, landing on '肆' (four). A scoreboard is displayed, listing prize tiers such as '五个连续的数字' (five consecutive numbers) for first place and '四个相同的数字' (four identical numbers) for third place. The camera shifts to an overhead view, showing the participants’ positions and the game layout, including the die and markers. The atmosphere is lively and playful, with participants reacting with laughter and excitement as the challenge unfolds.
